repo.name: Cocoapods-Deprecation-Exploration
repo.description: Repository to explore Cocoapods alternatives to build React Native

repo.name: hpple
repo.description: An XML/HTML parser for Objective-C, inspired by Hpricot.

repo.name: UICollectionViewLeftAlignedLayout
repo.description: A layout for UICollectionView that aligns the cells to the left.

repo.name: GCDWebServer
repo.description: The #1 HTTP server for iOS, macOS & tvOS (also includes web based uploader & WebDAV server)

repo.name: BLKFlexibleHeightBar
repo.description: Create condensing header bars like those seen in the Facebook, Square Cash, and Safari iOS apps.

repo.name: OHHTTPStubs
repo.description: Stub your network requests easily! Test your apps with fake network data and custom response time, response code and headers!
